message:
chore: sync beads issue tracker state for trauma guard and replay epics

Update issue tracker metadata reflecting multi-agent work progress:
- Trauma Guard epic (ft-so7qh) sub-beads: status transitions for
  policy integration, PTY feedback, config/tuning, telemetry, and
  validation matrix tasks
- Replay subsystem issues: capture pipeline and shadow rollout
  task updates
- General housekeeping: closed/updated timestamps on completed work

No functional code changes — purely issue metadata bookkeeping.
